properties.name: Forlagt Nørholmsvej
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Præsentation af Nørholmsvej og Mølholmsvejs forlængelse, detailbesigtigelse 15. april 2026 (st. 107.300–108.700)
properties.note: Nørholmsvej is relocated southwards and carried 6.75 m over the motorway at interchange TSA 12 - Mølholm, with signalised ramp junctions and noise barriers up to 6 m. Per Aalborg Kommune's HDT 2035 traffic model, the Mølholmsvej extension branches off right where Nørholmsvej meets the motorway interchange, not further along - both local roads originate from essentially the same node in that model. Geometry is anchored to the existing Nørholmsvej corridor: it follows the road with a slight southward relocation across the interchange (st. 107.300-108.700) and runs east to the Under Lien roundabout, matching the HDT 2035 model.

properties.name: Mølholmsvej/Nørholmsvejs forlængelse
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Præsentation af Nørholmsvej og Mølholmsvejs forlængelse, detailbesigtigelse 15. april 2026 (lokalvejens st. 1+000–3+000)
properties.note: New local road from a signalised T-junction right by the Nørholmsvej/motorway interchange (per Aalborg Kommune's HDT 2035 traffic model, both local roads originate from essentially the same node there), extending north-east between the lakes and tying into the existing western end of Mølholmsvej in the Løvstikkevej area, where accesses are re-established. Geometry is anchored to that existing dead-end and to the relocated Nørholmsvej, matching the HDT 2035 model diagonal.
